# CSuite Talent
> Specialist executive search firm placing C-suite and board-level leaders for family businesses and MNCs in manufacturing and FMCG across India and the Middle East. Founded by Anil Mahajane.

## What is CSuite Talent?

CSuite Talent is a discreet, mandate-driven executive search firm based in India. It is founded and led by Anil Mahajane — an IIFT MBA (Indian Institute of Foreign Trade, 1984), turnaround specialist and executive headhunter with 30+ years of experience across India and the Middle East.

The firm works on a limited number of assignments each year, accepting mandates selectively where the role carries strategic consequence. Engagements are declined where they are transactional, volume-driven, or incompatible with confidentiality.

## Founder

**Anil Mahajane** — Founder & CEO, CSuite Talent
- MBA, Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT), New Delhi, 1984
- 30+ years of corporate and international experience
- Recognised turnaround specialist and executive headhunter across India and the Middle East
- Has led multi-million dollar organisations as CEO
- Quoted in Economic Times, Financial Express, Rediff on executive hiring and workforce trends
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/honchohunters

## Services

- **Board & C-Suite Appointments** — CEO, COO, CFO, CHRO, CTO, CMO, MD, Independent Director and board-level placements
- **Confidential Leadership Transitions** — Replacement searches, succession-driven transitions and turnaround leadership hiring
- **Family Business Succession Planning** — Leadership continuity for promoter-driven and family-owned businesses
- **Specialist & High-Judgment Roles** — Niche-domain senior roles where conventional sourcing falls short
- **Growth & Transformation Hiring** — Leadership hiring for organisations undergoing growth, transformation and succession

## Industries

- Manufacturing & Industrial
- FMCG & Consumer Goods

## Client Profile

- Family-owned and promoter-driven businesses
- Multinational companies (MNCs) with India operations

## Geographies

- India (pan-India — all major business centres)
- Middle East: UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi), Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah), Kuwait, Qatar
- GCC region
